EventHandler.Name: AddOrder
EventHandler.Response: SLPickWorkbenchs.AddTmpPickListSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(CoNumVar), VAR V(CoLineVar), VAR V(CoReleaseVar), VAR V(DueDateVar), VAR V(ItemVar), VAR V(UMVar), VAR V(DerPickQtyVar), VAR V(CoCustNumVar), VAR V(CoCustSeqVar), VAR V(UbGroupVar), VAR V(FormCurWhse), VAR V(PackLoc), VAR V(PickerVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: ChangeWarehouse
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLWhses.CheckWhsePhyInvFlgSp( PARMS(VAR V(CurWhse), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(WhsePhyInvFlg), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: CheckWarehouse
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLWhses.CheckWhsePhyInvFlgSp( PARMS(VAR V(CurWhse), VAR V(Parm_Site), RVAR V(WhsePhyInvFlg), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: DeleteOrder
EventHandler.Response: SLPickWorkbenchs.DeleteTmpPickListSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(CoNumVar), VAR V(CoLineVar), VAR V(CoReleaseVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePickList
EventHandler.Response: SLLots.OldLotSerShipSp( PARMS(VAR , VAR P, VAR V(ProcessID), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePickList
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPickWorkbenchs.GeneratePickListSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(Picker), VAR V(PackLoc), RVAR V(BGTaskProcessID1), RVAR V(BGTaskProcessID2), RVAR V(StartingPickListId), RVAR V(EndingPickListId), VAR V(PrintPickLists), VAR V(GenerateBulkPickList), MESSAGE, VAR V(CurWhse)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GeneratePickListLocSerial
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPickWorkbenchs.GeneratePickListLocSerialSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(AssignLocations), VAR V(AssignLotSerialNumbers), VAR V(SkipOrderLineWhenCycleCountInProcess), VAR V(SkipOrderLineWhenQuantityAvailableIs0), VAR V(IncludeZeroQuantityAvailableKitItems), RVAR V(CycleCount), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: SkipOrderLines
EventHandler.Response: SLPickWorkbenchs.SkipOrderLinesWithAvailableIs0Sp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(SkipOrderLineWhenQuantityAvailableIs0), VAR V(IncludeZeroQuantityAvailableKitItems), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLInvparms.GetInvParmsSp ( PARMS(RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR , RVAR, RVAR V(PrintBarcodes), RVAR V(PackLoc), RVAR) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR PickWorkbench, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceInventoryLocGrid
Variable.Value: object2.SLTmpPickListLocs( CA() ORDERBY(Rank, Loc, Lot, QtyToPick ASC) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceInventorySerialGrid
Variable.Value: object2.SLTmpPickListSerials( CA() FILTERPERM(Loc = FP(2.SLTmpPickListLocs.Loc) AND (Lot is Null or Lot=FP(2.SLTmpPickListLocs.Lot)) AND (Reserved is Null OR Reserved = FP(2.SLTmpPickListLocs.Reserved))) ORDERBY(Loc, Lot, SerNum) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLPickWorkbenchs( OBJNAME(fPickWorkbench) FILTERPERM(CoStat='O' and CoiStat='O' and CoiWhse=FV(FormCurWhse) and (ItmStat<>'O' or DerNonInventoryItemFlag=1) and QtyShipped<QtyOrdered and PpvStatus is null and DerPickQty > 0 and ShipSite = FV(Parm_Site) and AllowOnPickList = 1) ORDERBY(CoCustNum,CoCustSeq,CoNum,CoLine,CoRelease) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SL.SLTmpPickLists( CA(RSV) OBJNAME(TmpPickLists) FILTERPERM(ProcessID=FV(ProcessID)) ORDERBY(PickGroup, RefNum, RefLineSuf, RefRelease) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( SL.SLTmpPickListSerials( CA(SV) OBJNAME(TmpPickListSerials) FILTERPERM(ProcessID=FV(ProcessID) and RefNum=FV(TempCoNum) and RefLineSuf=FV(TempCoLine) and RefRelease=FV(TempCoRelease) and Loc=FV(TempLoc) and Lot=FV(TempLot) and Reserved=FV(TempReserved)) ORDERBY(Loc, Lot, SerNum) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC4
Variable.Value: OBJECT4( SL.SLTmpPickListSerials( CA(SV) OBJNAME(TmpPickListSerials) FILTERPERM(ProcessID=FV(ProcessID) and RefNum=FV(TempCoNum) and RefLineSuf=FV(TempCoLine) and RefRelease=FV(TempCoRelease) and Loc=FV(TempLoc) and Lot=FV(TempLot) and Reserved=FV(TempReserved)) ORDERBY(Loc, Lot, SerNum) ) )

Variable.Name: lse_UbGroupGridCol
Variable.Value: 1\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0,6\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0,3\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0,4\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0,5\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0,7\Customer 6\Larry's Bicycles\0

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If Diff < QtyToPick And QtyRsvd > 0 And ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("DerNonInventoryItemFlag") = "0" Then
Sub ValidatePickQtyMsg(Qty As String, CoNum As String, CoLine As String, Rel As String, Loc As String)
' if unchecked and previously had error reset
' if any rows are in error disable tab, leave
' if selected row is in a group with a picker - popuate it

If CStr(oPrimaryCache.GetCurrentObjectIndex) <> ThisForm.Variables("PreviousRow").Value Or (String.IsNullOrEmpty(ThisForm.Variables("ValidateQtyReady").Value) Or ThisForm.Variables("ValidateQtyReady").Value = "0") Then
If PrevCoNum <> CurCoNum OR PrevCustNum <> CurCustNum OR PrevCustSeq <> CurCustSeq Then
' first scan for the largest Group ID
If PrevCoNum <> oPrimaryCache.GetObjectProperty("CoNum", i) OR PrevCustNum <> CurCustNum or PrevCustSeq <> CurCustSeq Then
If oPrimaryCache.IsObjectModified(p) = True And oPrimaryCache.GetObjectProperty("UbSelect", p) = "0" Then
' loop through selected rows on order tab and create inventory tab records
'if the user hit cancel on the modal form,
'Every Order where Qty To Pick is equal to Qty Remaining will be removed.'
dim GroupMap as System.Collections.Hashtable = new System.Collections.Hashtable
If i <> curIndex And CInt(oPrimaryCache.GetObjectProperty("UbGroup", i)) = Group Then
If Not curCustNum = CustNum Or Not curCustSeq = CustSeq Or Not currPaymentMethod = PaymentMethod Or Not currShipVia = ShipVia _
Or Not CurrCode = currCurrCode or Not CurDropShip = DropShip Or Not CurDropShipTo = DropShipTo Then
